message:
chore(beads): Add daemon test coverage epic and tasks

Create comprehensive bead structure for daemon test coverage:

Epic: bd-la28 - Complete Daemon Test Coverage
├── bd-2ud6 - E2E daemon lifecycle tests (Rust) [P1]
│   ├── bd-31l8 - Concurrent request and stress tests [P1] (blocked-by 2ud6)
│   ├── bd-3k2x - LRU eviction and memory pressure tests [P2] (blocked-by 2ud6)
│   ├── bd-1nya - Protocol version and error handling tests [P2] (blocked-by 2ud6)
│   └── bd-376e - Lock file and PID file tests [P2] (blocked-by 2ud6)
├── bd-2zll - Client auto-spawn and retry tests [P2] (independent)
├── bd-15k9 - E2E shell test script with detailed logging [P1] (independent)
├── bd-ak47 - Complete unit test coverage audit [P2] (independent)
└── bd-p4vs - Unit and integration tests (existing, IN_PROGRESS)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
